assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Provides specific maintenance window configuration for Saturday 2-6 AM with weekly recurrence using --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-duration, and --maintenance-window-recurrence parameters

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start "2026-01-04T02:00:00Z", --maintenance-window-duration 4h, and --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" for weekend scheduling

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command example for Q1 code freeze with 30-day exclusion period and mentions repeating for other quarters

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Provides dedicated gcloud command for November audit freeze covering the entire month with specific start/end times and scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states "'No upgrades' exclusions are limited to 30 days max. For longer freezes, chain multiple exclusions but be aware this accumulates security debt"

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Clearly states "The persistent exclusion remains in place - manual upgrades bypass ALL maintenance controls" in the manual upgrade section

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended channel specifically and explains it provides "up to 24 months support per version" for maximum control in regulated environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope parameters for both quarterly and annual exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Includes warning that "Extended exclusion periods accumulate security debt. Plan catch-up upgrades between audit cycles to stay current on patches and minor versions"
